nasb.text: So Moses stretched out his hand toward the sky, and there was thick darkness in all the land of Egypt for three days.

esv.text: So Moses stretched out his hand toward heaven, and there was pitch darkness in all the land of Egypt three days.

cnv.text: 摩西向天伸手，幽暗就臨到埃及全地三天之久。

ccb.text: 摩西向天伸杖，埃及全境便漆黑了三天之久。
